title: Pugmarks India International Enterprises is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Pugmarks India International Enterprises is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Pugmarks India International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Guest Relations Manager based out of Pimpri-Chinchwad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Pugmarks India International Enterprises:
Pugmarks India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Yield Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pugmarks India International Enterprises!
